resultList.dtldesc: Get ready to discover a wonderful 2 BHK flat for sale in the prestigious Hiranandani Parks, Oragadam, Chennai—a perfect choice if you're seeking a lifestyle that’s both elegant and effortlessly modern. Spanning 987 sq ft of carpet area, the space is bright, airy, and beautifully Vaastu-compliant with an east-facing orientation, ensuring harmony and positivity throughout.::::::Property Specifications::::::This beautifully planned home on the 14th floor of a 27-storey tower invites you with warmth and charm. Unfurnished and ready for your personal touch, this flat is a blank canvas where you can bring your dream home to life.::::::The living and dining area is perfect for entertaining, while the two good-sized bedrooms are well-lit and airy. The common bathroom and the en suite bathroom, which is attached to the master bedroom, both include modern western fittings with provision for geysers for everyday convenience.::::::The balcony is ideal for enjoying refreshing views and the dedicated store room to help keep your space neat and organized. The kitchen is both functional and aesthetic, with a granite countertop, sink, and utility area which facilitates smooth everyday chores.::::::Throughout the home, there is clean, stylish, low-maintenance tile flooring that offers a sleek, polished touch.::::::Facilities::::::Living here means more than just owning a flat—it’s about being part of a vibrant, self-contained community. You’ll have access to covered parking, round-the-clock water supply, 100% power backup, and the reassurance of on-site security and CCTV surveillance. Two elevators make coming and going a breeze.::::::Hiranandani Parks offers a lifestyle brimming with opportunities—from a multi-specialty family hospital and school to a world-class auditorium and sports amenities like golf, polo, squash, tennis, and cricket. There’s even a resto-bar, mini-theater, spa salon, retail outlets, pet walkway, 70% open green spaces, beautifully landscaped parks, a sports arena, an organic farm and much more to contribute to a premium lifestyle.::::::Locality::::::Nestled between the Grand Southern Trunk (GST) Road and National Highway 4, connectivity is excellent. With schools, hospitals, shopping malls, banks, and ATMs all within a kilometer, daily life is easy and efficient. The Singaperumal Koil Railway Station is just a 15-minute drive away, adding an extra layer of convenience to your everyday travelling.::

resultList.dtldesc: A spacious 3 BHK apartment is available for sale in the premium residential project TVS Emerald Elements at Kovilambakkam, Chennai. Spread across 1650 sq. ft, this under-construction apartment is thoughtfully designed for modern family living with excellent ventilation, functional layouts, and quality construction. Situated on the 3rd floor of an 18-floor tower, the property offers a comfortable lifestyle in a rapidly developing residential corridor. The apartment is North-facing, ensuring pleasant natural light and airflow throughout the day.Property SpecificationsThis unfurnished apartment features 3 spacious bedrooms, 3 bathrooms, and 2 balconies along with 1 utility area, making it ideal for contemporary family requirements. The property includes separate living and dining spaces that provide better functionality and privacy. The apartment is finished with quality tiled flooring and has been designed with a focus on space optimisation and ventilation. It also comes with 1 covered car parking space for residents. The layout is suitable for buyers looking to customise interiors as per their personal preferences.FacilitiesResidents of TVS Emerald Elements enjoy access to a wide range of modern lifestyle amenities including a swimming pool, clubhouse, landscaped gardens, outdoor gym, yoga deck, kids play area, senior citizen zone, power backup, lifts, CCTV surveillance, and 247 security. The project is developed across a large gated community with over 65 open spaces and multiple recreational facilities designed for comfortable urban living.LocalityLocated in Kovilambakkam on the prominent 200 Feet Radial Road, the project enjoys excellent connectivity to GST Road, OMR, Velachery, and Chennai International Airport. The upcoming metro station is located approximately 600 metres away, adding strong future connectivity benefits. Schools, hospitals, supermarkets, entertainment zones, and IT hubs are situated within 5 km of the property, making it an ideal residential destination for working professionals and families. The locality is witnessing rapid infrastructure growth and increasing residential demand in South Chennai.
